title: HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Regulates and ensures compliance with standards for health-related professions in Oregon. It oversees athletic trainers, body piercers, cosmetologists, denture technicians, midwives, environmental health specialists, hearing aid specialists, and respiratory therapists. The website provides a directory of licensed professionals and offers online license renewal services. 1430 Tandem Avenue NE Suite 180 Salem, OR 973011287 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4:30pm, Tuesday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 378-8667 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-8667 Licensing and General Information Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service. None required for provider complaints DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, Tuesday 9am-4:30pm Services: Business Registration/Licensing Consumer Protection Agencies Facility Licensing Occupational/Professional Licensing and Certification Practitioner Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSILOCYBIN SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE
